case_title: DIONISIO VAZQUEZ et al VS. GABRIEL CAVICH OJEDA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT OJEDA, GABRIEL CAVICH DIAZ, NECTALY
